subcodes.first_line: The horizon of the world hath been illumined through the coming of the Ancient King with His Most Great Name, and He hath testified that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انار افق العالم اذ اتی مالک القدم باسمه الاعظم و شهد انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
